claim: Use Primex termites for pest control.
_source_note: Jose, 2026-05-15: 'almost always use Primex termites for any pest control.'

claim: Use Abraham for small handyman work.
_source_note: Jose, 2026-05-15: 'pretty much always use Abraham for small handyman stuff.' Default when no portfolio pin matches.

claim: Use Kori for handyman work at Harrison Properties (Rose, Glencoe, Ozone).
_source_note: Jose, 2026-05-15: 'always send Kori for handyman stuff to Harrison Properties: Rose, Glencoe, and Ozone.' Overrides the default Abraham belief when portfolio=Harrison Properties.
Jose, 2026-05-15: 'for plumbing we pretty much always send Yonic.'

claim: For elevator issues, contact the property's designated elevator servicer — do not pick from the general vendor list; the servicer is per-property and recorded on the property record.
_source_note: Jose, 2026-05-15: 'for elevator problems we always have to contact the elevator servicer for that specific property.' Meta-rule, not a vendor pick — the consumer must look up the property's elevator servicer rather than pattern-matching by trade.
